title: LangGraph Stage 1 Runtime + Decision/Outcome/Evaluation/Insight v0

supersedes.reason: 旧 T006 只覆盖 Decision Store + TUI；新的 Stage 1 需要 LangGraph durable runtime、DecisionGraph、OutcomeGraph、EvaluationGraph、InsightExplorationGraph v0。

context: T006 建立自进化交易 agent 的 Stage 1 最小闭环：ContextSnapshot -> DecisionGraph -> OutcomeGraph -> EvaluationGraph，并加入受控 ReAct 的 InsightExplorationGraph v0。TUI、paper execution、broker mirror、自动训练和自动 promotion 全部后移。

steps.description: Spec gate：确认 Stage 1 ADR、spec、decision-record、CONTEXT.md 和旧 model-decision-store supersession 一致。
steps.exit_criteria: Review can prove old T006 is superseded and new Stage 1 decisions D001-D022 are the source of truth.

steps.description: LangGraph runtime foundation：引入最小 LangGraph graph runner、checkpoint store 分离、run_id/status/resume primitives 和 graph run inspection CLI。
steps.exit_criteria: A graph run can checkpoint, resume, expose run status, and keep runtime state separate from market_intel.db domain facts.

steps.description: Stage 1 domain schema/API：新增最小 domain tables 和 backend API for context snapshots, decisions, outcomes, insight candidates, evaluation reports, weighting policy stats。
steps.exit_criteria: market_intel.db contains the Stage 1 domain facts without writing legacy hypotheses/predictions or LangGraph checkpoints.

steps.description: Context pipeline v0：把现有 events/signals/market_bars/lessons/corpus/patterns 处理为 WeightedContextItem，并生成 immutable ContextSnapshot。
steps.exit_criteria: ContextSnapshot includes evidence_refs and capped weights; historical snapshots are immutable.

steps.description: DecisionGraph v0：symbol -> ContextSnapshot -> model DecisionEnvelope -> validation -> persist model_decisions -> schedule outcome horizons。
steps.exit_criteria: DecisionEnvelope is immutable; PAPER_*_CANDIDATE is persisted but does not submit paper orders.

steps.description: OutcomeGraph v0：label due outcomes for 30m/1h/EOD/1d/3d using absolute return, benchmark-relative return, invalidation proxy, and target proxy。
steps.exit_criteria: Each due decision can produce deterministic horizon labels and no outcome mutates historical ContextSnapshot.

steps.description: EvaluationGraph v0：aggregate model_path and override_path outcomes, report human override delta and current-model promotion recommendation。
steps.exit_criteria: Evaluation report emits hold/needs_more_data only; it does not auto-promote or require challenger comparison.

steps.description: InsightExplorationGraph v0：controlled ReAct over weighted context and historical outcomes; persist InsightCandidate only。
steps.exit_criteria: InsightGraph can generate candidate insights with evidence refs but cannot create AcceptedLesson, trade, train, or promote.

steps.description: CLI/report/docs/verification：wire Stage 1 CLI commands, markdown/json reports, code_map/CLAUDE updates, and scope review。
steps.exit_criteria: All Stage 1 evidence is attached; CLI smoke proves JSON command contract; no self-built TUI, paper execution, broker mirror, auto-training, or auto-promotion code is added.
